scope.description: Intentionally limited July demo court-routing seed. Read this boundary before extending.

federal: The four United States District Courts in California
United States Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit
july_demo_scope.fake_authority_fixture: D3's fictional Federal Legal Processing Bureau

not_in_directory_behavior.rule: A real out-of-state or other federal court may simply be outside this seed. Absence is not evidence of fraud, exactly as a RECAP docket miss is not evidence of fraud. Directory-only authority findings remain annotation-only.

out_of_scope: State courts beyond the optional Los Angeles Superior Court stub
Fuzzy matching that automatically declares a court official
Using a directory miss as a scam signal

steps: Replace ampersands with the word and
Remove punctuation except hyphens inside case numbers
normalization.automatic_match_policy: Only normalized exact matches against canonical_name or aliases may return OFFICIAL_COURT.
normalization.fuzzy_match_policy: A similar-looking name may return NAME_MISMATCH for review, but must never return OFFICIAL_COURT automatically.

OFFICIAL_COURT.meaning: The normalized name exactly matches a seeded official court name or alias.

NAME_MISMATCH.meaning: The name resembles a known court but is not an exact seeded name or alias.
NAME_MISMATCH.action: Request human review or ask the user to verify the court on its official website.

UNKNOWN_AUTHORITY.meaning: No exact official-court match was found in this limited seed.
UNKNOWN_AUTHORITY.action: Treat as annotation-only and route to human verification.

global_guardrails: A court-directory miss is annotation-only and never counts toward the two-signal scam threshold.
A case-number format mismatch is annotation-only until two teammates independently spot-check the rule.
A CourtListener or RECAP miss yields CANNOT_CONFIRM, not SCAM.
The directory contract designates CourtListener or RECAP for federal routes; runtime directory enforcement remains a release gate.
The state-court stub has no dedicated automated public-docket integration in the current prototype and therefore cannot independently establish VERIFIED.
No court name, domain, or case-number pattern alone decides the final verdict.

clerk_contact.selection_rule: Select only from the reviewed leading division code in the parsed case number: 2, 5, or 8. If the code is missing or unrecognized, do not guess or default to Los Angeles; show the official CACD contact page for human confirmation.

2.verification_method: Review against official public court contact and location sources

fixture_only_fictitious_authorities.evidence_scope: Known fictitious name in the Served D3 test specimen; this is not a general public blacklist entry.

directory_signal.label: Named court or authority not found

fixture_only_fictitious_authorities.important_note: The document may separately trigger affirmative FTC-backed scam patterns. This directory result alone never decides SCAM.

contact_source_policy.authoritative_source: The court's official public contact or location page
contact_source_policy.secondary_audit_source: CM/ECF CourtInfo may be used only as a corroborating audit source because its contact data may update slowly.
contact_source_policy.conflict_rule: The official public contact/location page always controls. A CM/ECF mismatch must not replace a public phone number, create a HOLD by itself, or appear in Guided Clerk Call UI.
contact_source_policy.uploaded_document_rule: Never use a phone number, email address, or URL printed on the uploaded document for Guided Clerk Call routing.
contact_source_policy.missing_route_rule: If a division or office cannot be selected from reviewed data, do not guess or silently default. Show the court's official contact page and request human confirmation.
contact_source_policy.court_staff_boundary: Court staff may confirm administrative case information but cannot authenticate an uploaded document or provide legal advice.
